title: Updated 2026 Oscar Best Makeup and Hairstyling Odds
text: Frankenstein leads as the strong favorite at 93%, followed by Sinners at 8%, Kokuho at 2%, and The Ugly Stepsister and The Smashing Machine at 1% each. Chris Raybon highlights a critical market inefficiency, noting that Sinners beat Frankenstein at both the makeup and hairstyling guild awards, yet Frankenstein dominates the betting odds. He argues the market is likely overvaluing the frontrunner in this technical category, where Sinners has appeared as the runner-up choice in Gold Derby voting and won this award in 2 of the last 3 years. Collin Whitchurch acknowledges Frankenstein's strength through Jacob Elordi's transformation work and its wins at Critics Choice and BAFTA, but agrees with Raybon that value exists on Sinners as an underdog play, particularly given the guild voting patterns favoring the film.
